race.comment: Quite a good race with a few different angles. SURFY PETE (3) has missed the frame at the last two but both in tougher grade. Was fourth in the Mount Gambier Summer Cup then sixth last time at Ararat in a BM70. Comes back a couple of notches and is overdue to break through. Gets his chance. KHANT BEE (5) is a lightly raced galloper who resumed from a long spell with an eye-catching fourth over a mile at Seymour. Will be far fitter for the run and looks suited by the extra ground. Worth following over a trip this time in. Long time since a win for SHE'S A CON (7) but is going much better than it looks. Raced in open class two back then last start drew an outside gate and was forced back to last before making late ground. Back a grade and drawn better. Can improve sharply. SHE FLYS (8) is one of the few that will be on speed and is going along well. Can give a sight off the low draw. BERTRAND (1) is a promising type stepping up in grade.
